summary: Completed testing of Client Integration Requests feature (iteration 25). Fixed critical backend bug where respond endpoint used PUT+Form instead of POST+JSON. All features working correctly: client can view pending requests, respond to requests, upload documents, and communicate via conversation.

fixed.issue: Endpoint was using PUT method with Form data, but frontend sends POST with JSON body
fixed.fix: Changed from PUT+Form to POST+JSON to match frontend implementation

issues:
Minor HTML nesting warning:
inside

causing hydration warning (non-blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: Backend respond endpoint now correctly uses POST method with JSON body (IntegrationRequestResponse model)
ClientIntegrationRequests component properly displays pending requests with section badges, messages, and document lists
Response dialog includes helpful suggestion about document upload
Conversation section shows bidirectional messages with proper styling
Tab badge correctly shows count of pending requests
seed_data_creation: Set password for existing client FRANCESCO JUNIOR DE LISO to enable testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Client Integration Requests feature fully functional. Features tested: 1) Client can view pending integration requests in 'Richieste e Messaggi' section, 2) Each request shows section badge, message, and requested documents list, 3) 'Rispondi' button opens dialog for client response, 4) 'Carica Documento' button allows document upload, 5) Conversation section shows bidirectional messages, 6) Tab badge shows count of pending requests. Backend endpoint fixed from PUT+Form to POST+JSON.

backend_api.respond_to_request: POST /api/declarations/tax-returns/{id}/integration-requests/{req_id}/respond - Working (client responds with JSON body)

frontend_ui.richieste_e_messaggi_tab: Working - Shows in TaxReturnForm with badge count
frontend_ui.pending_requests_alert: Working - Yellow alert showing count of pending requests
frontend_ui.request_cards: Working - Each request shows section badge, date, message, documents list
frontend_ui.rispondi_button: Working - Opens dialog with request message and response textarea
frontend_ui.carica_documento_button: Working - Triggers file upload with richiesta_id
frontend_ui.response_dialog: Working - Shows request message, textarea, suggestion, and submit button
frontend_ui.conversation_section: Working - Shows messages with sender info and timestamps
frontend_ui.message_input: Working - Textarea with send button for new messages

bug_fix_details.root_cause: Backend used @router.put with Form(...) parameter, frontend sent POST with JSON body
bug_fix_details.solution: Changed backend to @router.post with IntegrationRequestResponse Pydantic model
bug_fix_details.verification: Client successfully sent response via UI, verified in database with status='risposta'
